title: Blood For Blood
description: An Epic Anime Themed Combat Mod
body:
This Epic Anime Themed Mod Improves Combat In Minecraft **By Adding Finishers** To Attacks Aswell As **Weapons Having Abilities**, **Sounds And Their Own Custom Finishers**.         **Unfortunatly, Finishers Wont Work In Caves (Just So Mob Farms Wont Break) But If This Mod Gets 250 Downloads, I Will Fix This Withought Causing Issues With Mob Farms**

A Way To Support Me Is To Subscribe To My Channel To Stay Updated On My Mods :)

**Finishers**
When Killing A Monster In This Mod It Can Do A Series Of Finishers That Depend On The Mob You Killed And The Weapon You Have. These Finishers Can Range From Freezing A Stray Solid To Turning Creepers Into Fireworks.

**Sounds**
Weapons Now Have Different Hit Sounds Depending On The Weapon, Material And Damage. These Sounds Make It Easier To Register A Hit Aswell As Making The Combat Aspect Of Minecraft Better.

**Abilities**
Swords And Axes Now Have Different Abilities When You Right Click. Swords Have The Ability To Slice Everything Around You And Axes Can Bring Your Opponent Into A Sort Of Cutseen Of You Hitting Them Out Of Our Atmosphere.
